title: arnica louiseana var. frigida
intro: Arnica louiseana var. frigida, also known as Arctic Arnica, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Arctic regions of North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-rheumatic properties. The health benefits of Arnica louiseana var. frigida include reducing swelling and pain, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Arnica louiseana var. frigida is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and creams, which can be applied topically to the affected area for relief.
